name: Stewed Beancurd
recipeInstructions:
STEWED MILK BEANCURD
1. Parboil the fresh milk until it reaches a gentle boil.
Transfer to a small bowl and allow it to cool until a layer of milk skin forms on the surface.
Make a slit in the edge of the bowl.
2. Whisk together the egg yolk and egg whites (avoid over-whisking to form bubbles).
Gradually fold the whisked mixture into the cooled milk.
Add sugar and rice vinegar, stirring until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Strain the mixture through a sieve.
Pour into bowls containing the milk skin.
Arrange in a steaming basket and steam for 20 minutes over medium heat.
Uncover twice to achieve a smooth surface.
